Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Heck yeah! Let's get right into it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Now, I'd like your undivided attention.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}For a long time, Kirijo-kun and Sanada-kun were the only Persona-users we had.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}But that number has recently jumped to five.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Starting tonight at 12 AM, I'd like us to finally begin exploring {f 0 1 33}Tartarus{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Uhh... So I asked this yesterday, but what is that Tartar thing again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}...It's Tartarus. You seriously haven't seen it, Junpei?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It's no surprise you haven't seen it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Tartarus only appears during the Dark Hour, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Just like the Shadows... Interesting, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}The goal of our club—SEES—is to fight those Shadows. However...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Simply defeating Shadows during the Dark Hour isn't enough.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}We must get to the root of the problem. We need to destroy the Dark Hour itself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}You're sayin' if we run around Tartarus, we can somehow get rid of the Dark Hour?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Sorry I can't give you a better answer, but investigating the mysteries of that tower is part of our job.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}The bottom line is: we need more information.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Everything we encounter there will be a vital clue for us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}The exploration of Tartarus is of utmost importance. Consider it our top priority.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Our society, while remaining blissfully unaware of the Shadows, is slowly but surely succumbing to their influence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I would go as far as to say that the fate of the world rests on the shoulders of you Persona-users.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}...That's one hell of a responsibility, but the heroes of justice will prevail![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_8_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}It's also the perfect spot for us to train and improve our skills.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}That place is like a nest of Shadows, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}But Senpai... what about your injury?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Akihiko's still recovering from his wounds. He'll accompany us, but won't participate in the exploration.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Relax, ol' Junpei's got your backs![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 6 25 25}Not much point anyway, since I can't summon a Persona...[n]{f 1 1}
